---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="domain-section">
  <div class="domain-label">Time Series</div>
  <div class="project-list">

    <a href="timesfm-energy/" class="project-row">
      <div class="project-row-title">Energy Demand Forecasting: Testing a Zero-Shot Foundation Model on Real Grid Data</div>
      <div class="project-row-meta">
        <span>Python &nbsp;·&nbsp; TimesFM &nbsp;·&nbsp; SHAP</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-row-desc">
        Zero-shot forecasting on 16 years of hourly PJM East grid data — beating a naive lag-24h baseline
        across all context configurations, with residual analysis revealing systematic weather-driven bias.
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="timesfm-gasoline/" class="project-row">
      <div class="project-row-title">U.S. Gasoline Demand Forecasting: A Harder Test for Zero-Shot</div>
      <div class="project-row-meta">
        <span>Python &nbsp;·&nbsp; TimesFM</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-row-desc">
        Zero-shot forecasting with TimesFM 2.5 on weekly EIA gasoline data —
        beating a naive lag-52 baseline across three consecutive out-of-sample years,
        plus a residual ensemble analysis with XGBoost.
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>
```
